% Auto-generated paper appendix fragment.
\subsection*{Appendix Snapshot}
This appendix summarizes the pooled GPT-4/GPT-5 benchmark over 5376 scored responses. The full machine-generated statistics remain available separately in \texttt{combined\_quantum\_results\_live.tex}.
The pooled fit yields $\alpha=2.257$ with 95\% interval $[1.933, 2.587]$ and $\beta=-0.137$ with interval $[-0.523, 0.258]$.

\subsubsection*{Top-Line Summary}
\begin{center}
\begin{tabular}{lr}
\toprule
Metric & Value \\
\midrule
Usable evaluations & 5376 \\
Mean $d_{phys}$ & 0.440 \\
Median $d_{phys}$ & 0.354 \\
Exact-correct rate & 0.317 \\
$d_{phys} \ge 0.5$ rate & 0.435 \\
Full-error rate & 0.293 \\
Best model & GPT-5.4 \\
Weakest model & GPT-4o mini \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{center}

\subsubsection*{Time-Budget Feedback Ablation}
We also ran a separate repair ablation on a strong-model subset (\texttt{gpt-4.1}, \texttt{gpt-5.2}, \texttt{gpt-5.4 mini}, \texttt{gpt-5.4}) using depth 4 only, temperature 0.2, four prompts per family, and a five-minute per-prompt budget. Three repair modes were compared: one-shot, self-retry without explicit error signals, and verifier-guided retry.

\begin{center}
\begin{tabular}{lrrr}
\toprule
Mode & Solve rate & Mean solve time & Median solve time \\
\midrule
One-shot & 0.422 & 0.835 s & 0.732 s \\
Self-retry & 0.609 & 2.650 s & 1.288 s \\
Verifier feedback & 0.688 & 2.350 s & 1.025 s \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{center}

\noindent In the verifier-feedback run, pass@30s, pass@60s, pass@120s, and pass@300s were all equal to 0.688, indicating that recoverable gains saturated very early.

\begin{center}
\begin{tabular}{lccc}
\toprule
Category & One-shot & Self-retry & Verifier feedback \\
\midrule
Circuit & 0.250 & 0.375 & 0.500 \\
Measurement & 0.250 & 0.500 & 0.562 \\
Operator & 0.250 & 0.625 & 0.688 \\
Entanglement & 0.938 & 0.938 & 1.000 \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{center}

\begin{center}
\begin{tabular}{lccc}
\toprule
Model & One-shot & Self-retry & Verifier feedback \\
\midrule
GPT-4.1 & 0.312 & 0.438 & 0.562 \\
GPT-5.2 & 0.500 & 0.688 & 0.750 \\
GPT-5.4 mini & 0.438 & 0.500 & 0.562 \\
GPT-5.4 & 0.438 & 0.812 & 0.875 \\
\bottomrule
\end{tabular}
\end{center}
